content: The Seattle Police Department remembers and honors Officer Jackson V. Lone, who died on this day in 2005.

title: Lone, Officer Jackson V. | Behind the Badge Foundation
content: Officer Jackson Lone drowned when he fell as he attempted to secure a drifting tugboat. Officer Lone's partner immediately dove in and located him.
